title: Spoke hook stack drift: old session-start.sh + stale wai.md caused 9 PreToolUse:Bash hook errors per wakeup
signal: wheelwright-ai-website had: wai.md 30 days stale (pre wai-session-init), session-start.sh old version at WAI-Spoke/_hooks/ (not .claude/hooks/), CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR unset so PROJECT_DIR=.. Result: wakeup fell back to 9 bash commands, some hitting archived/trashed files. Fixed: all hooks synced to canonical framework versions, settings.json updated.
rationale: Need a fleet-wide hook freshness check — compare spoke hook mtimes to framework canonical. Stale > 14 days should surface in wakeup briefing.
